data: Respondents were asked, "During the past three months, did you have a severe headache or migraine?" Respondents were instructed to report pain that had lasted a whole day or more, and conversely, not to report fleeting or minor aches or pains.

caption: Crude percentages of migraines or severe headaches for adults aged 18 and over (standard errors), United States
